channel.title: Government Jobs & Exams Intelligence Tracker
channel.description: Daily verified government job and exam notifications (Central + Karnataka)

item.title: [Application Closed] ISRO URSC:01:2026: Recruitment to the posts of Scientist/Engineer - 'SC', Scientist/Engineer - 'SD' & Medical Officer - 'SC'

item.title: [Verified with Official Notification] SSC JE 2026 - expected July 2026 (Civil/Electrical/Mechanical only)
item.description: Staff Selection Commission | Last date: TBA | Priority: Low | B.E/B.Tech or Diploma in Civil/Electrical/Mechanical only - CS/AI-ML not eligible

item.title: [Verified with Official Notification] HAL Design Trainee / Management Trainee 2026 - watch for notification
item.description: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited | Last date: TBA | Priority: Low | B.E/B.Tech (branch-wise)

item.description: Railway Recruitment Boards | Last date: TBA | Priority: Low | Graduate (some posts 12th)
